hearing held. ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Court hears argument in the related lead case of CPF-25-519357 In Re: Michelle Harrison and takes the matter under submission and continues the remainder of all related Sephora cases for further hearing.
